---
title: ITvO blog
date: "2025-07-24"
categories: [IT for Research]
author:
  - Sergio Gutierrez
  - Peter Vos
---

## First ITvO Blog

From now on the [ITvO (IT for Research)](../topics/itvo.qmd) team will be using the Handbook Blog for sharing news, updates, and important announcements related to [SciCloud](/tools/scicloud/index.qmd), [ADA HPC](/tools/ada/index.qmd), [SciStor](/tools/scistor/index.qmd), and other services provided by ITvO. Here you will find information about new features, scheduled maintenance, service improvements. Stay tuned for the latest developments and insights from the ITvO team.
